'''R200 Ion Jet engines''' were an engine assembly manufactured by [[Koensayr Manufacturing/Legends|Koensayr Manufacturing]], utilized in that company's line of [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]]. It was a significant component in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] struggle against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Details==
Twin Koensayr R200 Ion Jet engines, rated at 250 [[KTU]], propelled the [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighter]] in [[Realspace/Legends|realspace]]. In an [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]], these [[ion fission engine]]s worked in conjunction with recessed [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] generators to attain speeds of 1,000 kilometers per hour. Each engine featured a sophisticated sensor array housed in domes at the front of the nacelle.

The R200 Ion Jet engines worked in the midst of the Koensayr [[R300-H hyperdrive motivator/Legends|R300-H hyperdrive]] unit are housed in the midsection, which was simply a reinforced central spar extending from the [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]]. Attached to this spar was a thin cross-wing, which contained the [[Thiodyne/Legends|Thiodyne]] [[03-R cryogenic power cell/Legends|03-R cryogenic power cells]] and connected the craft to the sublight drives.

==History==
The R200 Ion Jet Engine served as the Y-wing's main propulsion system. Y-wings were the most common craft in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], and R200 engines propelled these sturdy ships in the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], during the assault on the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]], as well as the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], during the Rebellion's destruction of the [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]].

[[File:TYEWing-Composite-XWingMasquerade1.jpg|thumb|left|200px|R200 Ion Jet engines on a TYE-Wing.]]

A common component, these engines often wound up in scratch-built starfighters known as "[[Ugly/Legends|uglies]]," such as the [[TYE-wing]] starfighter.

==Behind the scenes==
The R200 Ion Jet engines used in the [[original trilogy]] were created with Apollo Saturn V rockets 1/144th scale capped with pantyhose containers.
